home.heroTitle: Engineering the backbone of Myanmar's grid.
home.heroSub: Power transformers up to 230 kV / 150 MVA, manufactured to international standard at our Yangon facility.
home.pillar1Desc: Power and distribution transformers from 100 kVA pad-mount units to 230 kV / 150 MVA transmission class.
home.pillar2Desc: ABB-licensed UniSafe and System Pro E-Power medium- and low-voltage switchgear, assembled in Yangon.
home.pillar3Desc: Commissioning, testing, maintenance, and rapid-response repair for everything we deliver.
home.productsTitle: Built to specification. Tested to standard.
home.productsSub: A snapshot of the catalog — the full range is managed by our engineering team and updated continuously.
home.ctaSub: Send us your specification and our engineering team will respond with a detailed quotation.

products.title: Products
products.sub: Demonstration catalog — entries below are placeholders that the AG Holding team will manage from the staff portal.

services.title: Services
services.sub: From factory acceptance testing to energized commissioning and lifetime maintenance.
services.s1Desc: Factory and site acceptance testing, protection coordination, and energization support by our field engineering team.
services.s2Desc: Scheduled preventive maintenance, oil analysis, and thermographic inspection programs for installed fleets.
services.s3Desc: Workshop and on-site repair, rewinds, bushing and tap-changer replacement, and control retrofits.
services.s4Desc: Application engineering, specification review, and substation design assistance for utilities and EPC contractors.
